title.en: In an instant, the area was transformed into a ...

content.en:
Soon.

The Black-Winged Ape Clan led a large number of clansmen to trouble the Purple Dragon Void Worm Clan, and the two clans directly fought each other.

In an instant, the area was transformed into a battlefield.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian knew that his plan had succeeded!

If the Purple Dragon Void Worm fights with the Black-Winged Ape Clan, he can fish in troubled waters, and a copy of a fallen Purple Dragon Void Worm will not be discovered at all.

Soon.

Ye Tian found an opportunity, sensed a killed Purple Dragon Void Worm, and immediately copied it, and then entered the battlefield to erase the traces of the dead Purple Dragon Void Worm.

However, he hid himself and did not fight the powerful Blackwing Ape, so that the replica body would not fall.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian deliberately severely injured this replica body, and then retreated to the territory of the Purple Dragon Void Insect.

He then followed the attraction to the place where the treasure was.

The territory of the Purple Dragon Void Worm is very large, and there are many precious resources here.

Ye Tian didn't have time to collect other resources, and the most important thing for him at the moment was to find the treasure that could allow him to upgrade his copying talent.

That treasure was more precious to him than any resource treasure.

"Found it, here it is!"

Ye Tian came to a purple mountain.

Fortunately, this Purple Mountain has no defense, maybe there was defense before, but they all went to help fight, so this Purple Mountain does not have a Purple Dragon Void Worm now.

So, Ye Tian immediately sneaked into this purple mountain.

"That's a lot of resources!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

However, he didn't pick it, because if he was discovered, it would be difficult to leave.

If you only pick one type of treasure, the chances of it being found are very low.

He didn't want to take any risks until the treasure was safely transported.

Based on the attraction of the copying talent, he quickly locked on the location of the treasure, located in the depths of this purple mountain.

Click!!!

Ye Tian tore the Purple Mountain, and soon came to the depths of the Purple Mountain, grabbing a purple stone with one hand.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian stared at the purple stone, his heart was extremely excited.

If it weren't for the attraction of the copying talent, he wouldn't have thought that this purple stone would be able to upgrade the copying talent.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left here, and then left the Purple Dragon Void Insect Territory.

The whole process went smoothly and there was no trouble at all.

Then.

Ye Tian called the purple stone to his other copy body, which allowed the Purple Dragon Void Worm's copy body to return to the Purple Dragon Void Worm's territory again.

After all, there are still many resources in the Purple Dragon Void Worm Territory, so naturally they have to take this opportunity to collect more resources!

And his copy body also found a place where there were no powerful creatures, hid it and began to refine the purple stone.

He wants to refine the purple stone as soon as possible and upgrade his copying talent.

Once it's upgraded, it doesn't matter if you copy the body and fall.

......

The energy of the purple stone was continuously absorbed and refined by Ye Tian's copying talent, and the copying talent began to evolve, and the process was very painful.

But when he thought of the benefits of copying the talent after upgrading, he didn't feel that this pain was nothing.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, the copying talent was finally upgraded.

At this time, Ye Tian began to copy the dark immeasurable ancestral endowment he had seen at the beginning.

Soon, the Dark Immeasurable Ancestral Fu was successfully copied!

After the copying talent was upgraded, the number of Ye Tian's copying bodies also increased by two again, and the level of items that could copy everything was also higher.

For example, he now estimates that he can directly copy treasures like the Eternal Flint Stone, but the copied Eternal Flint cannot help people break through the shackles.

"Very good, the replication talent is upgraded, my current potential has been greatly improved, if I copy the immeasurable ancestral endowment of a sect, then my potential will reach an incredible level!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The territory of the Purple Dragon Void Worm Clan often fights one after another, and the Black Winged Ape Clan and the Purple Dragon Void Worm Clan have suffered heavy losses, and the two sides have no choice but to stop fighting.

And in the following days, as long as Ye Tian found an opportunity, he would mine some of the resources of the Purple Dragon Void Worm Clan and send them out.

Since he didn't get many resources each time, it didn't cause much of a stir.

In order to be able to obtain more resources, Ye Tian copied two more replica bodies to find resources in this territory.

A large amount of resources were transported from the hands of the replica bodies one by one, so that Ye Tian had more and more resources on his body.

He did not know when the meeting period would end, so he wanted to take advantage of the opportunity to obtain more resources.

At the same time, Ye Tian also obtained some key information through the Purple Dragon Void Worm Clan.

For example, this territory domain is Panshan Territory, but now Panshan Territory has lost contact with the outside world, and this territory has changed.

And there are many territories beyond the Panshan Territory, and countless territories have built a huge territory.

This realm is called the Genki Realm.

As for what was outside the Xuanqi Realm, the ordinary people of the Purple Dragon Void Worm Clan didn't know, maybe those few supreme strength-level powerhouses knew, but Ye Tian didn't dare to ask them rashly.

In the following days, Ye Tian not only harvested a large amount of resources, but also copied two immeasurable ancestral endowments by luck.

These two immeasurable ancestral endowments were copied from two extremely terrifying supreme-level creatures.

Of course, Ye Tian only sensed their immeasurable ancestral endowment from a distance, and did not get close, but he was still sensed by them, and was instantly killed.

Fortunately, Ye Tian successfully copied those two immeasurable ancestral endowments, and this was the harvest.

These two immeasurable ancestral endowments, one is the immeasurable ancestral endowment of gold, and the other is the immeasurable ancestral endowment of water.

With two more immeasurable ancestral endowments, Ye Tian will comprehend the Immeasurable Dao in the future, and his efficiency will be greatly improved.

Bang!!!!

The whole Panshan collar began to tremble.

Ye Tian knew very well that this was the end of the intersection period.

"Take advantage of the last opportunity to grab resources like crazy!"

Ye Tian doesn't care if these replica bodies can be evacuated safely, it's good to get some more resources!

In the end, Ye Tian only had three replica bodies that escaped.

The Soul Splitting Red Beast is alive, and there is also a human copy body and the Purple Dragon Void Worm copy body.

However, the Purple Dragon Void Worm definitely couldn't leave.

So, after Ye Tian obtained the resources on the Purple Dragon Void Insect, he let the Purple Dragon Void Worm copy its body and annihilate itself.

Not long after, Ye Tian was brought out of Panshan.

Soon after Ye Tian came out, the meeting period ended, and the Panshan Collar also disappeared.
